prepare-env.script:
mark 'prepare-env:start'
sleep 2
export_dotenv PREPARE_ENV_READY yes
export_dotenv PREPARE_ENV_CHAIN prepare-env
mark 'prepare-env:done'

prepare-cache.script:
mark 'prepare-cache:start'
sleep 6
export_dotenv PREPARE_CACHE_READY yes
export_dotenv PREPARE_CACHE_CHAIN prepare-cache
mark 'prepare-cache:done'

build-foundation.script:
require_env PREPARE_ENV_READY
require_env PREPARE_CACHE_READY

mark 'build-foundation:confirmed-full-prepare'
sleep 3

export_dotenv BUILD_FOUNDATION_READY yes
export_dotenv BUILD_FOUNDATION_CHAIN "${PREPARE_ENV_CHAIN}>${PREPARE_CACHE_CHAIN}>build-foundation"
mark 'build-foundation:done'

build-needs-cross-stage-single.script:
require_env PREPARE_ENV_READY
reject_env PREPARE_CACHE_READY

mark 'build-needs-cross-stage-single:started-before-prepare-cache-finished'
sleep 2

export_dotenv BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_SINGLE_READY yes
export_dotenv BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_SINGLE_CHAIN "${PREPARE_ENV_CHAIN}>build-needs-cross-stage-single"
mark 'build-needs-cross-stage-single:done'

build-needs-cross-stage-multi.script:
require_env PREPARE_ENV_READY
require_env PREPARE_CACHE_READY

mark 'build-needs-cross-stage-multi:confirmed-both-prepare-jobs'
sleep 5

export_dotenv BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_READY yes
export_dotenv BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_CHAIN "${PREPARE_ENV_CHAIN}>${PREPARE_CACHE_CHAIN}>build-needs-cross-stage-multi"
mark 'build-needs-cross-stage-multi:done'

build-needs-same-stage-single.script:
require_env BUILD_FOUNDATION_READY
reject_env BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_READY

mark 'build-needs-same-stage-single:started-before-build-needs-cross-stage-multi-finished'
sleep 2

export_dotenv BUILD_SAME_STAGE_SINGLE_READY yes
export_dotenv BUILD_SAME_STAGE_SINGLE_CHAIN "${BUILD_FOUNDATION_CHAIN}>build-needs-same-stage-single"
mark 'build-needs-same-stage-single:done'

observe-needs-mixed.script:
require_env BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_SINGLE_READY
require_env BUILD_SAME_STAGE_SINGLE_READY
reject_env BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_READY

mark 'observe-needs-mixed:started-before-build-needs-cross-stage-multi-finished'
sleep 1

export_dotenv OBSERVE_NEEDS_MIXED_READY yes
export_dotenv OBSERVE_NEEDS_MIXED_CHAIN "${BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_SINGLE_CHAIN}>${BUILD_SAME_STAGE_SINGLE_CHAIN}>observe-needs-mixed"
mark 'observe-needs-mixed:done'

observe-dependencies-single.script:
require_env BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_SINGLE_READY
# CANNOT require_env BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_READY
# CANNOT require_env BUILD_SAME_STAGE_SINGLE_READY

mark 'observe-dependencies-single:ran-after-build-stage-complete'
export_dotenv OBSERVE_DEPENDENCIES_SINGLE_READY yes
export_dotenv OBSERVE_DEPENDENCIES_SINGLE_CHAIN "${BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_SINGLE_CHAIN}>observe-dependencies-single"
mark 'observe-dependencies-single:done'

observe-dependencies-multi.script:
require_env PREPARE_ENV_READY
require_env BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_READY

mark 'observe-dependencies-multi:consumed-upstream-dotenv'
export_dotenv OBSERVE_DEPENDENCIES_MULTI_READY yes
export_dotenv OBSERVE_DEPENDENCIES_MULTI_CHAIN "${PREPARE_ENV_CHAIN}>${BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_CHAIN}>observe-dependencies-multi"
mark 'observe-dependencies-multi:done'

observe-needs-and-dependencies.script:
require_env PREPARE_CACHE_READY
require_env BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_READY
require_env BUILD_SAME_STAGE_SINGLE_READY

mark 'observe-needs-and-dependencies:ran-with-needs-and-dependencies'
export_dotenv OBSERVE_NEEDS_AND_DEPENDENCIES_READY yes
export_dotenv OBSERVE_NEEDS_AND_DEPENDENCIES_CHAIN "${PREPARE_CACHE_CHAIN}>${BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_CHAIN}>${BUILD_SAME_STAGE_SINGLE_CHAIN}>observe-needs-and-dependencies"
mark 'observe-needs-and-dependencies:done'

verify-needs-dependencies-flow.script:
assert_exists() {
  file="$1"
  test -f "$file" || {
    echo "[ERROR] missing expected file: $file"
    exit 1
  }
}

assert_contains() {
  file="$1"
  expected="$2"
  grep -F "$expected" "$file" >/dev/null || {
    echo "[ERROR] expected '$expected' in $file"
    exit 1
  }
}

assert_exists reports/prepare-env.log
assert_exists reports/prepare-cache.log
assert_exists reports/build-foundation.log
assert_exists reports/build-needs-cross-stage-single.log
assert_exists reports/build-needs-cross-stage-multi.log
assert_exists reports/build-needs-same-stage-single.log
assert_exists reports/observe-needs-mixed.log
assert_exists reports/observe-dependencies-single.log
assert_exists reports/observe-dependencies-multi.log
assert_exists reports/observe-needs-and-dependencies.log

assert_exists reports/build-foundation.env
assert_exists reports/build-needs-cross-stage-single.env
assert_exists reports/build-needs-cross-stage-multi.env
assert_exists reports/build-needs-same-stage-single.env
assert_exists reports/observe-needs-mixed.env
assert_exists reports/observe-dependencies-single.env
assert_exists reports/observe-dependencies-multi.env
assert_exists reports/observe-needs-and-dependencies.env

assert_contains reports/build-needs-cross-stage-single.log 'build-needs-cross-stage-single:started-before-prepare-cache-finished'
assert_contains reports/build-needs-same-stage-single.log 'build-needs-same-stage-single:started-before-build-needs-cross-stage-multi-finished'
assert_contains reports/observe-needs-mixed.log 'observe-needs-mixed:started-before-build-needs-cross-stage-multi-finished'
assert_contains reports/observe-dependencies-single.log 'observe-dependencies-single:ran-after-build-stage-complete'
assert_contains reports/observe-dependencies-multi.log 'observe-dependencies-multi:consumed-upstream-dotenv'
assert_contains reports/observe-needs-and-dependencies.log 'observe-needs-and-dependencies:ran-with-needs-and-dependencies'

assert_contains reports/build-foundation.env 'BUILD_FOUNDATION_CHAIN=prepare-env>prepare-cache>build-foundation'
assert_contains reports/build-needs-cross-stage-single.env 'BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_SINGLE_CHAIN=prepare-env>build-needs-cross-stage-single'
assert_contains reports/build-needs-cross-stage-multi.env 'BUILD_CROSS_STAGE_MULTI_CHAIN=prepare-env>prepare-cache>build-needs-cross-stage-multi'
assert_contains reports/build-needs-same-stage-single.env 'BUILD_SAME_STAGE_SINGLE_CHAIN=prepare-env>prepare-cache>build-foundation>build-needs-same-stage-single'
assert_contains reports/observe-needs-mixed.env 'OBSERVE_NEEDS_MIXED_CHAIN=prepare-env>build-needs-cross-stage-single>prepare-env>prepare-cache>build-foundation>build-needs-same-stage-single>observe-needs-mixed'
assert_contains reports/observe-dependencies-single.env 'OBSERVE_DEPENDENCIES_SINGLE_CHAIN=prepare-env>build-needs-cross-stage-single>observe-dependencies-single'
assert_contains reports/observe-dependencies-multi.env 'OBSERVE_DEPENDENCIES_MULTI_CHAIN=prepare-env>prepare-env>prepare-cache>build-needs-cross-stage-multi>observe-dependencies-multi'
assert_contains reports/observe-needs-and-dependencies.env 'OBSERVE_NEEDS_AND_DEPENDENCIES_CHAIN=prepare-cache>prepare-env>prepare-cache>build-needs-cross-stage-multi>prepare-env>prepare-cache>build-foundation>build-needs-same-stage-single>observe-needs-and-dependencies'
